news.headline: Binance expands Monitoring Tag to include 11 tokens like BAL, CTXC, CVX. Tag removed from 2 tokens on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Starting on July 1, 2024, Binance plans to expand the Monitoring Tag to cover an additional 11 tokens, while concurrently removing it from two tokens. This strategic decision reflects the platform's commitment to enhancing its monitoring efforts and keeping pace with the evolving crypto landscape.

news.headline: Global Life Reinsurance Market to reach USD 735.6 Billion by 2033, with 12.7% CAGR. Growth driven by mortality trends & longevity risk solutions. Treaty reinsurance dominates market. Mortality solutions and Asia-Pacific digitalization key trends.
news.summary: The research report by Custom Market Insights focuses on the global Life Reinsurance Market, indicating that the market size was around USD 230.9 Billion in 2023 and is projected to reach approximately USD 234.5 Billion in 2024. The report predicts a growth to about USD 735.6 Billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 12.7% during the forecast period of 2024-2033. The emphasis on mortality trends and longevity risk is highlighted, with reinsurers meeting the need for longevity risk solutions due to aging populations worldwide. The article mentions the importance of advances in predictive modeling, data analytics, and technological specialization for the life reinsurance sector. In addition, it notes that treaty reinsurance and mortality solutions segments held high market shares in 2023 and are expected to maintain dominance during the forecast period. The Asia-Pacific region is mentioned for its growing use of digitalization and technology in underwriting procedures and product innovation to meet changing demands. Berkshire Hathaway Life is highlighted as a risk management firm offering insurance and reinsurance solutions. Key figures include a market size of USD 234.5 Billion in 2024 and USD 735.6 Billion projected for 2033 with a CAGR of 12.7%.

news.headline: Swiss Manufacturing PMI: 43.9 actual, below forecast (45.5) and prior (46.4).
Executed transactions related to the buyback of shares have been carried out recently.
Biden's team stands by amid challenges.
France's stocks rise significantly after election's first round, biggest surge in nearly 2 years.
Latest Spanish Manufacturing PMI came in at 52.3, lower than expected 52.9 and previous 54.0.
Binance starts July missions, giving away 2M Binance Points to users through tasks and activities.
news.summary: Binance has initiated its July Missions, providing users with the opportunity to earn a total of 2,000,000 Binance Points by participating in different tasks and activities during this month.

news.headline: AIIB invests US$75M in green and blue bonds of SeABank in Vietnam. Stock code: SSB.
news.summary: In HANOI, Vietnam, on July 1, 2024, the Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB) has announced an investment totaling US$75 million. This investment is directed towards the green and blue bonds released by Southeast Asia Commercial Joint Stock Bank (SeABank), which is identified by the stock code SSB. The AIIB's financial contribution of US$75 million aims to support SeABank's initiatives on sustainable development and environmental protection.

news.headline: Yard Force introduces Electric Pressure Washer - 2000 PSI 2.3 GPM on Amazon, ideal for efficient home cleaning.
news.summary: Yard Force, a top player in outdoor cleaning solutions, has launched the 2000 PSI 2.3 GPM Electric Powered Pressure Washer in Kennesaw, Ga. This efficient washer is now on Amazon, catering to women and housewives aiming for effortless maintenance of their living spaces. The washer boasts a 13-Amp/1800-watt motor, promising powerful cleaning in a user-friendly manner. Ideal for keeping homes and outdoor areas spotless with minimal hassle, this product emphasizes convenience and effectiveness.

news.headline: Boeing to acquire Spirit Aero for an undisclosed stock deal, said to be worth billions.
Big law firms on Wall Street are aggressively recruiting top lawyers with lucrative pay packages, akin to the NBA frenzy. #LegalPoaching #HighCompensation
news.summary: Highly lucrative compensation packages are being offered to top lawyers, particularly those who are preferred by affluent private equity clients. These attorneys are receiving substantial pay increases to cater to the needs of their wealthy clientele.

news.headline: EUR, GBP, NZD, CAD, AUD, USD, JPY, CHF in ascending order of strength in currency chart.
Jo Malone London partners with Paddington, the kind-hearted bear, known for spreading positivity. Collaboration announced on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in London, Jo Malone London revealed an exciting partnership with a well-known symbol of compassion. The iconic Paddington™ bear, known for his generous spirit and ability to see the good in others, has served as the muse for this collaboration. This collaboration showcases the values of kindness and generosity that Paddington™ embodies, reaching out to a wide audience with this heartwarming initiative.

news.headline: Kedrion to distribute Biotest's Yimmugo® in U.S. after FDA approval. Long-term agreement for commercialization.
news.summary: In Castelvecchio Pascoli, Italy on July 1, 2024, Kedrion Biopharma Inc. revealed its plan for a long-term partnership with Biotest AG to oversee the complete commercialization and distribution of Yimmugo® immunoglobulin therapy in the United States. This initiative comes after successful negotiations and aims to ensure widespread availability of Yimmugo® to patients in need across the country. This collaboration is expected to significantly boost the accessibility of the therapy, benefiting a large number of individuals in the U.S. market.

news.headline: Christophe De Vusser becomes Bain & Co's Worldwide Managing Partner/CEO. Elected in Jan, starts on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Bain & Company, a top global management consulting firm, announced the appointment of Christophe De Vusser as their new Worldwide Managing Partner (CEO). De Vusser, elected to lead Bain in January, takes on the role from Boston and London.

news.headline: Capcom acquires Minimum Studios Co., Ltd. to make it a subsidiary.
news.summary: In Osaka, Japan, Capcom has acquired Minimum Studios Co., Ltd. through a share acquisition. This move solidifies Minimum Studios Co., Ltd. as a subsidiary of Capcom.

news.headline: Acuity Knowledge Partners acquires PPA Group to enhance automation for commercial lenders in Germany and Switzerland.
news.summary: Acuity Knowledge Partners, a prominent provider of research, analytics, and business intelligence solutions for the financial services industry, has recently finalized the acquisition of PPA Group. PPA, a well-known service provider in Germany and Switzerland, specializes in technology-enabled solutions for financial institutions. Their services primarily revolve around custom structuring of global financial and ESG data for commercial lending and analysis. The acquisition is expected to strengthen Acuity's presence in the region, with PPA's offices strategically located in Darmstadt. This move signifies Acuity's commitment to expanding its portfolio and enhancing its offerings in the financial services sector.

news.headline: Arlanda Express partners with ZetaDisplay for digital signage solutions, involving 250 new installations at train stations and platforms.
news.summary: ZetaDisplay, a top European digital signage solutions provider, has signed a long-term exclusive framework deal with A-Train AB / Arlanda express for development, deployment, and services. Under the agreement, ZetaDisplay's software platform will be implemented across the entire screen network. The upgrade will cover digital signage installations on train sets and the replacement of advertising screens at Arlanda express's train stations, platforms, and Arlanda Station. Approximately 250 new installations will be carried out in this intricate train transport setting, featuring specific technical, conceptual, and system requirements.

news.headline: Sportradar clinches significant client victories with its robust Managed Trading Services, boosting its market position.
news.summary: An alarming report has indicated that the recent surge in COVID-19 cases has overwhelmed hospitals, with a record number of patients needing critical care. The report stated that intensive care units are currently operating at 95% capacity, with over 80% of patients requiring ventilation support. This increase in cases has resulted in a shortage of essential medical supplies, including ventilators and personal protective equipment for healthcare workers. The situation is dire, with healthcare facilities struggling to keep up with the high demand for medical care. Experts are urging the public to adhere to safety measures to help curb the spread of the virus and alleviate the strain on the healthcare system.

news.headline: Preliminary data on early redemptions announced by Jyske Realkredit. Contact for info: Christian Bech-Ravn, tel. (+45) 89 89 92 25.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Jyske Realkredit released Announcement no. 56/2024 to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S regarding preliminary data on early redemptions (prepayments) in their bonds. This information is in compliance with S. 24 of the Capital Markets Act. For details on the early redemptions, refer to the attached file or visit the company's website at jyskerealkredit.com. Additional information on data format and file content can be found on Nasdaq's website at www.nasdaqomxnordic.com. Any inquiries can be directed to Christian Bech-Ravn, Head of Investor Relations, at tel. (+45) 89 89 92 25. Note that the Danish version of this announcement takes precedence.

news.headline: Le Pen gains momentum as France leans right after round one.
Boeing acquires Spirit Aero for $4.7 billion in stock deal.
French Finance Minister indicates possibility of leaving post as he suggests French public may have determined outcome.
Nidec Corp announces own share repurchase plan from June 1 to June 30, 2024; no shares repurchased yet.
news.summary: In Kyoto, Japan, Nidec Corporation (TOKYO:6594; OTC US:NJDCY) provided an update on its share repurchase program approved on May 24, 2024. The repurchase period for their common stock is from June 1 to June 30, 2024. As of the latest announcement, the Company has repurchased 0 shares. This action is in accordance with Article 459 (1) of the Companies Act of Japan.

news.headline: Telegram's latest update adds Mini App Bar, boosts monetization for creators with paid media, and improves story search.
news.summary: In the latest update for the month of June, Telegram introduced several new features, including a Mini App Bar, paid media opportunities for content creators, and improved search capabilities for stories. These updates offer users more versatility and functionality within the platform. The Mini App Bar allows for quick access to various mini apps within Telegram, while the paid media feature provides content creators with monetization options. Additionally, the enhanced story search features enable users to more easily find and navigate through stories on the platform. These additions aim to enhance user experience and engagement on Telegram.

news.headline: French Finance Minister Le Maire warns about the risks posed by both far-left & far-right parties in France.
Bavarian Nordic in Denmark switches its DKK 1 billion credit line to a sustainability-linked loan on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Today, Bavarian Nordic revealed its decision to convert an unused DKK 1 billion syndicated revolving credit facility into a sustainability-linked loan. This move signifies a shift towards more sustainable financing options for the company.

news.headline: CFO of Green Hydrogen Systems, Ole Vesterbæk, steps down from position.
Renewable ammonia agreement signed in Egypt between Yara Clean Ammonia, Scatec, ECHEM, and MOPCO on 1 July 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Scatec ASA, a prominent provider of renewable energy solutions, along with partners ECHEM and MOPCO, reached a preliminary agreement with Yara Clean Ammonia, the global leader in ammonia trading and distribution, for the off-taking of renewable ammonia from Egypt. This partnership is a significant step towards promoting sustainable energy practices.

news.headline: Capgemini enhances automotive systems engineering in Germany with Lösch & Partner acquisition.
Swiss retail sales up 0.4% year-on-year, lower than 2.7% forecasted and previous.
French Finance Minister Le Maire aims to prevent far-right party from achieving absolute majority.
UK's house prices rose by 0.2% (forecast was -0.1%, previous was 0.4%).
UK house prices rose 1.5% YoY, surpassing the 1.2% forecast and previous 1.3%.
Shiba Inu's burn rate skyrockets by 1393%, 301.68 million SHIB tokens removed from circulation, boosting price.
news.summary: In the past 24 hours, Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB), the world's second-largest memecoin, experienced a substantial increase in its burn rate. Approximately 301.68 million SHIB tokens were removed from circulation, marking a notable 1393% surge, as reported by the official burn tracker, Shibburn. Coin burning involves intentionally sending cryptocurrency tokens to an unusable wallet address to reduce their availability. This act aims to introduce scarcity and enhance the token's market value.

news.headline: Gensource Potash cancels admission of common shares from AIM, now exclusively tradable on TSXV. Shareholders affected.
news.summary: SASKATOON, SK & LONDON - Gensource Potash Corporation, trading under the symbol GSP on the TSX Venture Exchange, has officially announced the cancellation of the admission of its common shares to trade on the AIM in accordance with the London Stock Exchange rules. With this announcement, shareholders can now exclusively trade their common shares on the TSX Venture Exchange. The Company made this decision effective immediately.

news.headline: Max Stock Limited (TASE: MAXO) reports The Phoenix Insurance Company sold 2,917,097 shares of the company.
news.summary: In Caesarea, Israel, on July 1, 2024, Max Stock Limited (TASE: MAXO) disclosed that on June 30, 2024, The Phoenix Insurance Company Ltd. conveyed to the company that they had sold 2,917,097 shares.

news.headline: Kalmar Corporation's Shareholders' Nomination Board composition announced with key figures undisclosed.
Voltalia and TAQA Arabia sign agreement at Egypt-EU Investment Conference 2024 for renewable energy & green hydrogen cluster in Egypt.
news.summary: Voltalia, a global renewable energy company listed on Euronext Paris with ISIN code FR0011995588, along with their partner TAQA Arabia, have recently entered into a framework agreement. This agreement was formalized during the Egypt-EU Investment Conference 2024 in Cairo on June 29 and 30. The conference saw key stakeholders from both Egypt and the EU coming together to discuss investment opportunities and foster collaboration. This partnership signifies a significant step towards enhancing renewable energy efforts in the region, highlighting the growing importance of sustainable solutions.

news.headline: Exor's latest press release details progress of buyback program, offering insights on key figures.
BNB Chain adds new DeFi, AI, & Web3 gaming projects from June 23 to 30, expanding its ecosystem.
news.summary: From June 23 to June 30, BNB Chain unveiled a series of new projects focusing on DeFi, AI, and Web3 gaming. These initiatives were introduced in a bid to enhance the ecosystem of BNB Chain.

news.headline: Trinasolar and Universidad Politécnica de Madrid collaborate on solar research, signing a long-term agreement on June 26, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Madrid, it was reported that Trinasolar recently signed a significant long-term partnership deal with the Institute of Solar Energy at Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (IES-UPM) on June 26. This agreement marks a significant step in Trinasolar's ongoing collaboration with a prestigious institution in the solar energy sector.

news.headline: Accenture finalizes acquisition of OPENSTREAM HOLDINGS in New York & Tokyo, including subsidiaries Open Stream and Neutral.
news.summary: In a recent business development, Accenture has finalized the acquisition of OPENSTREAM HOLDINGS along with its affiliated companies, Open Stream and Neutral. This strategic move bolsters Accenture's portfolio and strengthens their market position. The acquisition includes all assets and resources of OPENSTREAM HOLDINGS and its subsidiaries.

news.headline: Juniper Research predicts 5.2bn global digital identity app installs by 2029, driven by remote onboarding, expected to increase by 126%.
news.summary: In Basingstoke, England, a recent study by Juniper Research revealed that the global digital identity app downloads are projected to increase by a significant 126%. This growth is primarily attributed to the remote onboarding of users.

news.headline: ENGWE unveils limited edition P20 Ace electric bike in tribute to 2024 Olympics, following popular P20 release in March.
news.summary: In Milan on July 1, 2024, ENGWE, a top electric bike brand, revealed the debut of the ENGWE P20 Ace Limited Edition. Following the success of the P20 from March, this special edition model is linked to the 2024 Olympics. It presents a unique design and advanced features, aligning with the athletic spirit of the Games.

news.headline: Dawn Health and Merck collaborate on digital solution for Growth Hormone Disorders (GHD).
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark on July 1, 2024, Dawn Health, a prominent digital health firm focused on patient-centered advancements, revealed a collaboration with the top pharmaceutical giant, Merck. Together, they are developing a digital remedy for Growth Hormone Disorders (GHD). This strategic partnership aims to address the needs of individuals with GHD, marking a significant step in leveraging technology to enhance healthcare. Stay tuned for updates on this innovative initiative.

news.headline: Register for MapleStory N pioneer test until July 7, test on July 24 for 10 days; NEXPACE's announcement in Abu Dhabi on July 1.
news.summary: NEXPACE has officially opened registration for their Pioneer Test until July 7, with testers to be chosen through a survey on their website. The testing phase will take place from July 24 for 10 days in Abu Dhabi, UAE, to assess the game's infrastructure and stability.

news.headline: Alm. Brand A/S to sell Energy & Marine business for DKK 1.6 billion to Norwegian insurer Gard in new agreement.
CRH completes acquisition of majority stake in Adbri, acquiring remaining 57% of shares not owned by Barro. #BuildingMaterials #NYC
news.summary: In New York, CRH plc (NYSE: CRH), a top supplier of building materials solutions, has successfully completed the Scheme of Arrangement with Barro Group to acquire Adbri Ltd. CRH now owns the remaining 57% of Adbri's ordinary shares not held by Barro. CRH (NYSE: CRH, LSE: CRH) is a key player in the industry, providing innovative building materials solutions.
